title: Immersive but distinguishable suspicious Sand and Gravel
description: A resource pack that makes suspicious sand and gravel more easily visible, but doesn't take away from the joy of Archaeology.
body:
The default textures for suspicious gravel and suspicious sand are way too similar to regular sand and gravel, making Archaeology frustrating. All the existing texture packs I found were super lazy and just drew an entirely too obvious red or black border around the blocks. That destroys all the fun of Archaeology.

So I made my own!. This one aims to keep things immersive - but not frustrating. Enjoy!
